user.title: Heat Stress Guidance — API
user.description: Configure the API endpoint. Use the default for the hosted service or enter your local server address (e.g. http://homeassistant.local:3299).

weather.title: Heat Stress Guidance — Weather Source
weather.description:
Choose how WBGT (Wet Bulb Globe Temperature) is obtained.

**location** — fetches an hourly forecast using fixed latitude/longitude.
**tracked_entity** — fetches an hourly forecast using latitude/longitude from a person or mobile device tracker entity.
**ha_sensors** — computes WBGT from existing temperature and humidity sensor entities in Home Assistant.
**manual_wbgt** — reads a WBGT sensor entity directly (e.g. Davis Vantage, research station).

data.location_entity: Person or mobile device tracker entity (tracked_entity mode)
data.globe_temp_entity: Globe temperature entity ID — optional (ha_sensors mode)

worker.title: Heat Stress Guidance — Worker Profile
worker.description:
These settings determine which heat stress thresholds apply and how the composite work/rest schedule is calculated.

**static** — use a fixed work intensity setting.
**mqtt** — derive intensity automatically from an open-sensor accelerometer stream over MQTT.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the API. Verify the URL and that the server is running.
error.missing_location: Latitude and longitude are required for location mode.
error.missing_location_entity: A person or device tracker entity is required for tracked_entity mode.
error.missing_sensors: Temperature and humidity entity IDs are required for ha_sensors mode.
error.missing_wbgt_entity: A WBGT entity ID is required for manual_wbgt mode.
error.invalid_time: Shift times must be in HH:MM format (e.g. 07:00).
error.mqtt_not_available: MQTT integration is not configured. Add the MQTT integration in Home Assistant first.
error.missing_mqtt_topic: An MQTT topic is required when using MQTT workload detection.

data.location_entity: Person or mobile device tracker entity (tracked_entity mode)
data.globe_temp_entity: Globe temperature entity ID — optional (ha_sensors mode)
